'''дёҷз”і'''пјҲгҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒёгҒ„гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ
[[з”Іеӯҗ]]гҒӢгӮүж•°гҒҲгҒҰ33з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[д№ҷжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[дёҒй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|дә”иЎҢ]]гҒҜзҒ«гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дә”иЎҢгҒҜйҮ‘гҒ§гҖҒ[[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢ|зӣёеүӢ]]пјҲзҒ«еүӢйҮ‘пјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ
==дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ==
==дёҷз”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== ===[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]=== дёҷз”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ]]гҒ®4ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''дёҷз”і'''пјҲгҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒёгҒ„гҒӢгҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒёгҒ„гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®33з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[д№ҷжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[дёҒй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[дёҷ]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[зҒ«]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ[[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|зӣёеүӢ]]пјҲзҒ«еүӢйҮ‘пјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ
==дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ36гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢдёҷз”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[36е№ҙ]] *[[96е№ҙ]] *[[156е№ҙ]] *[[216е№ҙ]] *[[276е№ҙ]] *[[336е№ҙ]] *[[396е№ҙ]] *[[456е№ҙ]] *[[516е№ҙ]] *[[576е№ҙ]] *[[636е№ҙ]] *[[696е№ҙ]] *[[756е№ҙ]] *[[816е№ҙ]] *[[876е№ҙ]] *[[936е№ҙ]] *[[996е№ҙ]] | *[[1056е№ҙ]] *[[1116е№ҙ]] *[[1176е№ҙ]] *[[1236е№ҙ]] *[[1296е№ҙ]] *[[1356е№ҙ]] *[[1416е№ҙ]] *[[1476е№ҙ]] *[[1536е№ҙ]] *[[1596е№ҙ]] *[[1656е№ҙ]] *[[1716е№ҙ]] *[[1776е№ҙ]] *[[1836е№ҙ]] *[[1896е№ҙ]] *[[1956е№ҙ]] | *[[2016е№ҙ]] *[[2076е№ҙ]] *[[2136е№ҙ]] *[[2196е№ҙ]] *[[2256е№ҙ]] *[[2316е№ҙ]] *[[2376е№ҙ]] *[[2436е№ҙ]] *[[2496е№ҙ]] *[[2556е№ҙ]] *[[2616е№ҙ]] *[[2676е№ҙ]] *[[2736е№ҙ]] *[[2796е№ҙ]] *[[2856е№ҙ]] *[[2916е№ҙ]] *[[2976е№ҙ]] |}
==дёҷз”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ1гғ»6пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[иҫӣ]]гғ»[[дёҷ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢдёҷз”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ
==дёҷз”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== дёҷз”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== дёҷз”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ]]гҒ®4ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:дёҷз”і]][[Category:дёҷз”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:дёҷз”і]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Fire Monkey]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[ja:дёҷз”і]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}вҶө'''" to "{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''{{subst:PAGENAME}} also known as "
revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і'''пјҲгҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒёгҒ„гҒӢгҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒёгҒ„гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[Sexagenary cycle]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ
Sexagenary cycleгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®33з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[д№ҷжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[дёҒй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[дёҷ]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[зҒ«]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ[[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|зӣёеүӢ]]пјҲзҒ«еүӢйҮ‘пјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ

==дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ36гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢдёҷз”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[36е№ҙ]] *[[96е№ҙ]] *[[156е№ҙ]] *[[216е№ҙ]] *[[276е№ҙ]] *[[336е№ҙ]] *[[396е№ҙ]] *[[456е№ҙ]] *[[516е№ҙ]] *[[576е№ҙ]] *[[636е№ҙ]] *[[696е№ҙ]] *[[756е№ҙ]] *[[816е№ҙ]] *[[876е№ҙ]] *[[936е№ҙ]] *[[996е№ҙ]] | *[[1056е№ҙ]] *[[1116е№ҙ]] *[[1176е№ҙ]] *[[1236е№ҙ]] *[[1296е№ҙ]] *[[1356е№ҙ]] *[[1416е№ҙ]] *[[1476е№ҙ]] *[[1536е№ҙ]] *[[1596е№ҙ]] *[[1656е№ҙ]] *[[1716е№ҙ]] *[[1776е№ҙ]] *[[1836е№ҙ]] *[[1896е№ҙ]] *[[1956е№ҙ]] | *[[2016е№ҙ]] *[[2076е№ҙ]] *[[2136е№ҙ]] *[[2196е№ҙ]] *[[2256е№ҙ]] *[[2316е№ҙ]] *[[2376е№ҙ]] *[[2436е№ҙ]] *[[2496е№ҙ]] *[[2556е№ҙ]] *[[2616е№ҙ]] *[[2676е№ҙ]] *[[2736е№ҙ]] *[[2796е№ҙ]] *[[2856е№ҙ]] *[[2916е№ҙ]] *[[2976е№ҙ]] |}

{{е№Іж”Ҝ}} '''дёҷз”і'''пјҲгҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒёгҒ„гҒӢгҒ®гҒ•гӮӢгҖҒгҒёгҒ„гҒ—гӮ“пјүгҒҜгҖҒ[[е№Іж”Ҝ]]гҒ®дёҖгҒӨгҖӮ
е№Іж”ҜгҒ®зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒ®33з•Әзӣ®гҒ§гҖҒеүҚгҒҜ[[д№ҷжңӘ]]гҖҒж¬ЎгҒҜ[[дёҒй…ү]]гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ[[йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ]]гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ[[еҚҒе№І]]гҒ®[[дёҷ]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[зҒ«]]гҖҒ[[еҚҒдәҢж”Ҝ]]гҒ®[[з”і]]гҒҜйҷҪгҒ®[[йҮ‘]]гҒ§гҖҒ[[дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|зӣёеүӢ]]пјҲзҒ«еүӢйҮ‘пјүгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ
==дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ== [[иҘҝжҡҰ]]е№ҙгӮ’60гҒ§еүІгҒЈгҒҰ36гҒҢдҪҷгӮӢе№ҙгҒҢдёҷз”ігҒ®[[е№ҙ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ {| class="wikitable" |+'''дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ''' |- ![[1еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[2еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]]!![[3еҚғе№ҙзҙҖ]] |- | *[[36е№ҙ]] *[[96е№ҙ]] *[[156е№ҙ]] *[[216е№ҙ]] *[[276е№ҙ]] *[[336е№ҙ]] *[[396е№ҙ]] *[[456е№ҙ]] *[[516е№ҙ]] *[[576е№ҙ]] *[[636е№ҙ]] *[[696е№ҙ]] *[[756е№ҙ]] *[[816е№ҙ]] *[[876е№ҙ]] *[[936е№ҙ]] *[[996е№ҙ]] | *[[1056е№ҙ]] *[[1116е№ҙ]] *[[1176е№ҙ]] *[[1236е№ҙ]] *[[1296е№ҙ]] *[[1356е№ҙ]] *[[1416е№ҙ]] *[[1476е№ҙ]] *[[1536е№ҙ]] *[[1596е№ҙ]] *[[1656е№ҙ]] *[[1716е№ҙ]] *[[1776е№ҙ]] *[[1836е№ҙ]] *[[1896е№ҙ]] *[[1956е№ҙ]] | *[[2016е№ҙ]] *[[2076е№ҙ]] *[[2136е№ҙ]] *[[2196е№ҙ]] *[[2256е№ҙ]] *[[2316е№ҙ]] *[[2376е№ҙ]] *[[2436е№ҙ]] *[[2496е№ҙ]] *[[2556е№ҙ]] *[[2616е№ҙ]] *[[2676е№ҙ]] *[[2736е№ҙ]] *[[2796е№ҙ]] *[[2856е№ҙ]] *[[2916е№ҙ]] *[[2976е№ҙ]] |}
==дёҷз”ігҒ®жңҲ== иҘҝжҡҰе№ҙгҒ®дёӢ1жЎҒгҒҢ1гғ»6пјҲеҚҒе№ІгҒҢ[[иҫӣ]]гғ»[[дёҷ]]пјүгҒ®е№ҙгҒ®[[7жңҲ]]гҒҢдёҷз”ігҒ®[[жңҲ (жҡҰ)|жңҲ]]гҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҶжңҲгҒҜгҖҒ[[ж—§жҡҰ]]гҒ®жңҲгӮ„[[зҜҖжңҲ]]пјҲ[[з«Ӣз§Ӣ]]гҒӢгӮү[[зҷҪйңІ]]гҒ®еүҚж—ҘгҒҫгҒ§пјүгӮ’йҒ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгӮӮгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ
==дёҷз”ігҒ®ж—Ҙ== дёҷз”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒ®[[йҒёж—Ҙ]]гҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҖӮ ===йҒёж—Ҙ=== дёҷз”ігҒ®ж—ҘгҒҜ[[еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ]]гҒ®4ж—Ҙзӣ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ ==й–ўйҖЈй …зӣ®== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:е№Іж”Ҝ|гҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sДӯng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sб№іМӮn]][[ja:дёҷз”і]][[ko:лі‘мӢ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Aap]][[vi:BГӯnh ThГўn]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh_min_nan:PГ©ng-sin]][[zh_yue:дёҷз”і]][[zh:дёҷз”і]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061831]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn
<!-- == * Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ (hinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: гҒёгҒ„гҒӢгҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ (heika-no-saru) ***Onyomi: гҒёгҒ„гҒ—гӮ“ (heishin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongsin ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|qq=|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire '''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|qq=|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sДӯng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sб№іМӮn]][[ja:дёҷз”і]][[ko:лі‘мӢ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Aap]][[vi:BГӯnh ThГўn]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sin]][[zh-yue:дёҷз”і]][[zh:дёҷз”і]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061831]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn
<!-- == * Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ (hinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: гҒёгҒ„гҒӢгҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ (heika-no-saru) ***Onyomi: гҒёгҒ„гҒ—гӮ“ (heishin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongsin ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn
--> ==Years of Yang Fire Monkey== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 36 when divided by 60 is a year of Heishin ([[:en:Year|year]]). {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Heishin (дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ)''' |- ! However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn
<!-- == * Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ•гӮӢ (hinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: гҒёгҒ„гҒӢгҒ®гҒ•гӮӢ (heika-no-saru) ***Onyomi: гҒёгҒ„гҒ—гӮ“ (heishin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongsin ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn
--> ==Years of Yang Fire Monkey== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 36 when divided by 60 is a year of Heishin ([[:en:Year|year]]). {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Heishin (дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ)''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sДӯng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sб№іМӮn]][[ja:дёҷз”і]][[ko:лі‘мӢ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Aap]][[vi:BГӯnh ThГўn]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sin]][[zh-yue:дёҷз”і]][[zh:дёҷз”і]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061831]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo '''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sДӯng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sб№іМӮn]][[ja:дёҷз”і]][[ko:лі‘мӢ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Aap]][[vi:BГӯnh ThГўn]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sin]][[zh-yue:дёҷз”і]][[zh:дёҷз”і]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061831]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sДӯng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sб№іМӮn]][[ja:дёҷз”і]][[ko:лі‘мӢ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Aap]][[vi:BГӯnh ThГўn]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sin]][[zh-yue:дёҷз”і]][[zh:дёҷз”і]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061831]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sДӯng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sб№іМӮn]][[ja:дёҷз”і]][[ko:лі‘мӢ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Aap]][[vi:BГӯnh ThГўn]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sin]][[zh-yue:дёҷз”і]][[zh:дёҷз”і]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061831]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn
