==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo '''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (з”і)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Monkey (дёҷз”і) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngshД“n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: heishin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (лі‘мӢ ) ** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh ThГўn

--> ==Years of Yang Fire Monkey== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 36 when divided by 60 is a year of Heishin ([[:en:Year|year]]). {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Heishin (дёҷз”ігҒ®е№ҙ)''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the Heishin month ([[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows. === Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) === Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the Heishin month ({{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows.
=== Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) ===
Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the Heishin month ({{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows.
=== Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) ===
Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe ==Months of Yang Fire Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the Heishin month ({{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows.
=== Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) ===
Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (з”і)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Years of Yang Fire Monkey==

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the Heishin month ({{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows.
=== Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) ===
Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (з”і)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the Heishin month ({{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows.
=== Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) ===
Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (з”і)|1=Monkey (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=РңРөСӮР°Р» (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|lt=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|2=ja|3=иҫӣ|4=zh|5=иҫӣ|1=Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иҫӣ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July|1=July}} is designated as the Heishin month ({{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йҒёж—Ҙ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows.
=== Selected Day (йҒёж—Ҙ) ===
Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja|еӨ©дёҖеӨ©дёҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten IchijЕҚ|ja_comment=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=еӨ©дёҖзҘһ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=дёҷз”і|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bЗҗngshД“n|w=ping-shen|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ КӮЙҷn|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ КӮЙҗn|mc=pГҰЕӢ КӮin|oc-bs=praЕӢ КӮin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as дёҷз”і''' (hinoesaru (дёҷз”і), heikanosaru (дёҷз”і), heishin (дёҷз”і)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|е…ӯеҚҒе№Іж”Ҝ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=е№Іж”Ҝ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|д№ҷжңӘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дёҒй…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (з”і)|1=Monkey (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йҮ‘)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йҮ‘)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgЕ© hГ nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дә”иЎҢжҖқжғі#зӣёеүӢпјҲгҒқгҒҶгҒ“гҒҸпјү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
